title: nigritella rhellicani subsp. cenisia
intro: Nigritella rhellicani subsp. cenisia, also known as the Cenisio nigritella, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the Italian Alps. As an orchid, it is a flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of nigritella rhellicani subsp. cenisia include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of nigritella rhellicani subsp. cenisia are typically made into tinctures, infusions, or ointments, and are used to treat a range of health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
